data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a virtual queue option, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation of this functionality, such as API responses or state checks confirming the ability to take a number remotely and arrive when close. This lack of concrete evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the virtual queue option functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the virtual queue option requirement.
